title: hedyotis fluviatilis var. typica
intro: Hedyotis fluviatilis var. typica, also known as water button, is a type of flowering plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to China and is traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues. In traditional Chinese medicine, Hedyotis fluviatilis var. typica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal benefits, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically proven.
